message:
refactor(raptorq): remove legacy soliton-based repair path, unify on RFC 6330 tuples

Complete the migration from heuristic RobustSoliton-based repair equation
generation to the RFC 6330 tuple semantics introduced in d8c37ad.

decoder.rs:
- Remove RobustSoliton field from InactivationDecoder — the soliton
  distribution is no longer used for repair equation construction
- Remove unused imports (RobustSoliton, DetRng)
- Replace .map().unwrap_or() with .map_or() in Equation::coef()
- Consolidate repair_equation() and repair_equation_rfc6330() into a
  single tuple-based implementation using SystematicParams::rfc_repair_equation()
- Remove the legacy heuristic repair equation path entirely

systematic.rs:
- Refactor ConstraintMatrix construction for clarity
- Improve parameter validation ordering and error messages
- Clean up documentation comments for RFC 6330 accuracy

linalg.rs:
- Improve Gaussian solver pivot selection with clearer Markowitz
  threshold handling
- Add structured context to solver error paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
